tasks.label: Run Uvicorn (Fast)
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r backend/requirement.txt && cd backend && ../.venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-delay 2

tasks.label: Run Uvicorn (Production)
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r backend/requirement.txt && cd backend && ../.venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --workers 4 --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
